title: It is said/reported/believed (that) + S + V

formulas.zh: 某人／某事據說……（主詞改寫變體）

explanation: 此句型以虛主詞 It 開頭，搭配被動語態動詞（is said / is reported / is believed 等），再接 that 子句來傳達「據說、據報導、據信」之意。此結構常見於新聞報導與學術寫作，用來表示消息來源不明確或為普遍看法，語氣較客觀。that 可省略，但正式書寫中建議保留。此句型亦可改寫為「S + is said + to V」的主詞句型，兩者意義相同但結構不同，考試中常互相轉換出題。

examples.eng: It is said that the old temple was built over three hundred years ago.
examples.chi: 據說那座古廟建於三百多年前。

examples.eng: It is reported that the typhoon will reach southern Taiwan by tomorrow morning.
examples.chi: 據報導，颱風將於明天早上抵達台灣南部。

examples.eng: It is believed that regular exercise can reduce the risk of heart disease.
examples.chi: 據信規律運動能降低心臟病的風險。

examples.eng: It is estimated that over two million tourists visit the island every year.
examples.chi: 據估計，每年有超過兩百萬名遊客造訪該島嶼。

extension.tip: 判斷是否使用此句型，關鍵在於句意是否表達「消息來源不確定」或「普遍看法」。若主詞明確為某人的意見，應改用主動語態（如 People believe...）。考試常考 It is said that... 與 S is said to V... 的互換，注意 to V 的時態需與原句一致。

examples.test: It is said that he speaks five languages. ↔ He is said to speak five languages.
examples.result: → 兩句意思相同，前者用虛主詞 It，後者以 He 為主詞搭配不定詞。

examples.test: It is reported that the bridge was damaged. ↔ The bridge is reported to have been damaged.
examples.result: → that 子句中為過去式時，改寫需用「to have + p.p.」表示動作先於主要動詞。

examples.test: People believe that she is honest. → It is believed that she is honest.
examples.result: → 主動句改被動虛主詞句，動詞 believe 變為 is believed，原受詞子句移至 that 之後。

extension.note: 「It is ＿ed that...」看到被動加 that，就是「據～」句型，記住動詞都用過去分詞！

parts: that the new policy will create more job opportunities for young people.
exercises.sentence: It is reported that the new policy will create more job opportunities for young people.
exercises.translation: 據報導，新政策將為年輕人創造更多工作機會。

parts: that drinking green tea every day is good for health.
exercises.sentence: It is believed that drinking green tea every day is good for health.
exercises.translation: 一般認為每天喝綠茶對健康有益。

parts: It is said that the famous writer
over fifty novels during his lifetime.
exercises.sentence: It is said that the famous writer wrote over fifty novels during his lifetime.
exercises.translation: 據說那位知名作家一生中寫了超過五十部小說。

parts: be increasing due to climate change.
exercises.sentence: The number of endangered species is estimated to be increasing due to climate change.
exercises.translation: 據估計，瀕危物種的數量因氣候變遷而持續增加。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的被動語態片語完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: It _______ that the famous actor will appear at the film festival next month.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「is said」。此句型使用「It is said that + S + V」結構，需要被動語態「is said」來表達「據說」之意。B 項「has said」是完成式主動語態，不符合虛主詞句型；C 項「is saying」是進行式，語態與語意不當；D 項「was saying」是過去進行式，時態不符合。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的句型轉換，意思應與原句相同
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is reported that the new vaccine has been approved by the government. = The new vaccine _______ approved by the government.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「is reported to be」。此為「S + is reported + to V」的主詞句型轉換，與原「It is reported that S + V」意義相同。B 項「being」為動名詞，不符合不定詞結構；C 項缺少助動詞「is」，不完整；D 項「reporting」用法錯誤，應為被動語態「reported」。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的被動結構，須注意時態一致性
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is believed _______ over two million people attended the concert last Saturday.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「that」。此句使用「It is believed that + S + V」結構，that 為從屬連詞，引導名詞子句。B 項「to attend」為不定詞，與該句型不符；C 項「attending」為動名詞，無法引導完整子句；D 項「which」為關係代詞，不適用於此結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 須判斷正確的被動語態形式與主詞一致性
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is said that the ancient artifacts _______ to the museum for public exhibition next month, and the artifacts _______ to be of great historical value.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「will be donated; are believed」。第一空應使被動語態「will be donated」表示文物將被捐贈；第二空主詞為複數「artifacts」，需用「are believed」與主詞一致。B 項第一空用主動語態錯誤，第二空主詞不一致；C 項第二空主詞不一致；D 項第一空時態不符，第二空無法呼應原句「said」的內容。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 據說這位新任校長曾經是一位優秀的教師。
translation_exercises.answer: It is said that the new principal was once an excellent teacher. / The new principal is said to have been an excellent teacher.
hints: 提示1：句型框架為『It is said (that) + S + V』，that 可省略但建議保留
提示2：『曾經是』應使用過去式 was 或完成式 have been，注意時態搭配

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 據報導，這家新開的餐廳使用了許多有機食材。
translation_exercises.answer: It is reported that the newly opened restaurant uses many organic ingredients. / The newly opened restaurant is reported to use many organic ingredients.
hints: 提示1：『據報導』用 is reported，後接 that 子句或改寫為『S + is reported + to V』的主詞型
提示2：『新開的』可用 newly opened 或 brand new，『許多』用 many 或 a lot of

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 據信許多年輕人因為過度使用手機而患上了睡眠問題。
translation_exercises.answer: It is believed that many young people have developed sleep problems due to excessive use of smartphones. / Many young people are believed to have developed sleep problems due to excessive use of smartphones.
hints: 提示1：『據信』用 is believed，『患上』可用 develop 或 suffer from，注意時態應為現在完成式 have developed
提示2：『過度使用』用 excessive use of 或 overuse of；主詞型改寫時，to have developed 需保留完成式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 據說政府計畫於未來三年內投資大量資金來改善鄉村地區的教育設施，以縮小城鄉差距。
translation_exercises.answer: It is said that the government plans to invest a huge amount of funds over the next three years to improve educational facilities in rural areas in order to narrow the gap between urban and rural regions. / The government is said to plan to invest a huge amount of funds over the next three years to improve educational facilities in rural areas so as to narrow the gap between urban and rural regions.
key_points: in order to / so as to (表示目的)
城鄉差距 urban-rural gap / gap between urban and rural regions
hints: 提示1：複雜句型結構：『It is said + that 子句』，子句中需含有『plans to V』結構，最後加上目的子句『in order to / so as to V』
提示2：『未來三年內』用 over the next three years；主詞型改寫時變成『is said to plan to V』，需注意雙重不定詞的使用；『縮小差距』可用 narrow the gap 或 close the gap
